sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Wec Energy director Klappa sells $3.47 million in stock
feed.summary: Gale E. Klappa, a director at WEC Energy Group, INC. (NYSE:WEC), sold 30,000 shares of common stock for approximately $3.47 million in mid-February 2026. Prior to the sale, Klappa exercised options to acquire the same number of shares for $2.045 million. Following these transactions, Klappa directly owns 276,600 shares, with additional shares held indirectly through an employee retirement plan.

feed.title: KraneShares launches AGIX ETF amid market volatility, betting on robust demand for AI technologies
feed.summary: KraneShares has launched AGIX, an exchange-traded fund (ETF), designed to track companies involved in AI hardware, infrastructure, and applications, despite recent volatility in AI stocks. The ETF, with an annual operating expense of 1%, aims to give investors exposure to the growing AI sector, which KraneShares' CIO Brandan Ahern believes has the potential to add trillions in value to the global economy. AGIX includes major tech companies like Microsoft, Nvidia, and Apple among its top holdings, positioning it to capitalize on the sustained demand for AI technologies.

feed.title: Oculis Publishes Notifications of Transactions by Persons Discharging Managerial Responsibilities and Persons Closely Associated
feed.summary: Oculis Holding AG announced the publication of notifications related to transactions by persons discharging managerial responsibilities and closely associated persons. These notifications pertain to the vesting of earnout shares and the subsequent removal of restrictions on these ordinary shares. The article lists specific notifications for Anthony Rosenberg, Pall Johannesson, Riad Sherif, and Sylvia Cheung.

feed.title: MoffettNathanson Adjusts Price Target on Omnicom Group to $95 From $100, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: MoffettNathanson has adjusted its price target for Omnicom Group (OMC) to $95, down from $100, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This update comes amidst other analyst adjustments for Omnicom Group on the same day, with BNP Paribas maintaining an Outperform rating and Morgan Stanley maintaining an Equalweight rating, both with reduced price targets. The company recently reported its Q4 2025 earnings which saw adjusted earnings and revenue rise, alongside the announcement of a $5 billion share repurchase program.

feed.title: Exelon Commends U.S. Department of the Treasury for Issuing Tax Notice that Addresses Affordability, Promotes Grid Investment
feed.summary: Exelon has praised the U.S. Department of the Treasury for a new corporate alternative minimum tax (CAMT) notice, which is expected to save customers up to $200 million over four years and encourage vital infrastructure investments for grid reliability. This announcement, coupled with Exelon's "The Exelon Promise" initiative, aims to tackle energy affordability by supporting customers and investing in the grid. The company emphasizes the urgent need for grid hardening due to rising demand and threats, thanking Congress for leadership on the CAMT issue.

feed.title: P&G at the 2026 Consumer Analyst Group of New York (CAGNY) Conference
feed.summary: P&G executives discussed adaptations to its integrated growth strategy at the 2026 CAGNY Conference, addressing external changes like media fragmentation, inflation, and retail evolution. The company plans near-term interventions focusing on consumer-centricity, transforming brand building, and holistic retailer partnerships. P&G aims to leverage its strengths to proactively shape the future of the CPG industry.

feed.title: Stifel Raises Price Target on Host Hotels & Resorts to $22 From $20.25, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Stifel has increased its price target for Host Hotels & Resorts (HST) to $22 from $20.25, while maintaining a "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes after the company's recent Q4 2025 earnings call and financial guidance for 2026, which indicated upbeat annual FFO, partly due to the strength of its luxury hotel portfolio. Host Hotels & Resorts specializes in owning and operating hotels across the United States, Brazil, and Canada.

feed.title: Governor Abbott Announces NRG Energy Expansion In Houston
feed.summary: Governor Greg Abbott announced that NRG Energy, Inc. will construct a new 455-megawatt natural gas power plant at its Greens Bayou facility in Harris County, an investment of $617 million. This project is designated under the Texas Jobs, Energy, Technology, and Innovation (JETI) program and is expected to enhance Texas' energy infrastructure, meet growing energy demands, and create job opportunities. The plant, which secured a Texas Energy Fund loan in November 2025, is projected to begin generating power for the ERCOT region by 2028.

feed.title: BMO Capital Lifts Price Target on J.B. Hunt Transport Services to $245 From $225, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: BMO Capital has increased its price target for J.B. Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) to $245 from $225, while reiterating an Outperform rating for the company. This adjustment reflects BMO Capital's continued positive outlook on the transportation services provider's stock. The article also provides a brief overview of J.B. Hunt's operations, including its various transportation and logistics services.

feed.title: Will Banking Solutions Tailwinds Help Fidelity National Navigate Q4?
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (FIS) is expected to report its Q4 2025 results on February 24, 2026, with an estimated EPS of $1.69 and revenues of $2.74 billion, indicating year-over-year growth. However, the Zacks Earnings ESP of -0.37% combined with a Zacks Rank #3 does not conclusively predict an earnings beat. The company anticipates tailwinds from its Banking Solutions and Capital Market Solutions segments, but these could be partially offset by rising costs.

feed.title: Rothschild & Co Redburn Cuts Cadence Design Systems Price Target to $375 From $410, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Rothschild & Co Redburn has lowered its price target for Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) to $375 from $410, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst price target changes for the company, suggesting a recalibration based on recent market conditions or company performance. Cadence Design Systems, a leading provider of design software for integrated circuits, continues to be viewed positively by Rothschild & Co Redburn despite the target reduction.

feed.title: Daiwa Securities Adjusts Verizon Communications Price Target to $58 From $48, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Daiwa Securities has raised its price target for Verizon Communications (NYSE: VZ) to $58 from $48, while reaffirming a Buy rating on the stock. The adjustment reflects a positive outlook for the telecommunications giant, indicating increased confidence from the securities firm.

feed.title: Omnicom surges as buyback plan and post-merger update overshadow headline loss
feed.summary: Omnicom (OMC) saw a 13.4% surge in its stock price, driven by the announcement of a new $5 billion share repurchase program and strong fourth-quarter 2025 revenue following its acquisition of Interpublic. Despite a reported net loss due to merger costs, investors reacted positively to increased cost-synergy targets and management's focus on integration. Large institutional investors significantly increased their holdings in OMC in Q4 2025.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Has Lowered Expectations for TPG RE Finance Trust (NYSE:TRTX) Stock Price
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has reduced its price target for TPG RE Finance Trust (NYSE:TRTX) from $11.00 to $10.50, though it maintained an "overweight" rating. This adjustment comes amidst mixed analyst sentiment, with a consensus "Hold" rating and several other firms also trimming their price targets or downgrading the stock. Despite missing EPS estimates, TRTX surpassed revenue expectations in its latest quarter, and its shares are currently trading around $8.52.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Noble (NYSE:NE) Stock
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. recently increased its price target for Noble (NYSE:NE) stock from $33 to $41, maintaining a "neutral" rating despite the implied 8.3% downside from the current price. Noble's shares are trading at $44.71, with a market cap of $7.12 billion and a P/E of 33.09, and the company missed quarterly EPS estimates and saw a 17.6% revenue decline year-over-year. Analysts generally hold a "Hold" rating with an average target of $38.63, while institutional ownership is high and insiders have been net sellers.

feed.title: Alphabet Class C (GOOG) stock rises on Google’s Shopee AI deal — what traders watch next
feed.summary: Alphabet's Class C shares (GOOG) rose after Google announced a partnership with Sea Ltd to develop an "agentic" AI shopping prototype for Shopee and integrate AI tools into Sea’s Garena gaming arm. The deal also includes payment integration through Sea's financial unit, Monee, targeting innovative AI-driven transactions in Southeast Asia. This development, along with a rebound in overall AI sector sentiment following Nvidia's deal with Meta, pushed Alphabet's stock up, while traders also eye upcoming U.S. PCE inflation reports for macro-economic guidance.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials CO SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials Company has released its 2025 10-K report, detailing strong financial performance with revenues of $7,941.1 million and net earnings of $1,078.1 million. The report highlights strategic growth through acquisitions, commitment to sustainability, and improved operational efficiency across its aggregates, asphalt, and concrete segments. While the company faces economic and operational risks, it plans to continue expanding and returning value to shareholders through buybacks and dividends.

feed.title: Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ:VRSK) Price Target Lowered to $220.00 at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. lowered its price target for Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ:VRSK) to $220.00 while maintaining an "overweight" rating based on the company's strong Q4 earnings, share repurchase program, and dividend increase. Despite exceeding Q4 revenue and EPS estimates, the company's FY2026 guidance was below Street expectations, leading to some short-term uncertainty. Verisk's stock traded up 0.7% with a market cap of $25.83 billion, and analysts currently hold an average "Hold" rating with a consensus price target of $256.14.

feed.title: Insulet (NASDAQ:PODD) Price Target Lowered to $340.00 at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. lowered its price target for Insulet (NASDAQ:PODD) from $415.00 to $340.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. Despite a strong earnings beat with $1.55 EPS and 31% year-over-year revenue growth, the stock fell about 5.6% due to cautious near-term guidance. The consensus analyst rating remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $359.10.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark moves entire ad account to McCann
feed.summary: Kimberly-Clark has transitioned its entire advertising account from FCB London to McCann. This move comes after AMV BBDO, which absorbed FCB London following Omnicom's takeover of Interpublic, won the Essity business for the Cushelle brand, a direct competitor to Kimberly-Clark's Andrex. Despite the change, key creative and strategy leads from the Andrex account will remain with AMV BBDO.

feed.title: JCI: Acquisition-driven innovation and strong data center demand fuel double-digit growth outlook
feed.summary: Johnson Controls International (JCI) anticipates double-digit sales growth, driven by its acquisition of Alloy which enhances technology for data center cooling. The company's strategy focuses on AI, mission-critical verticals, and energy efficiency, supported by strong order growth and operational improvements. This outlook is based on a recent Barclays conference transcript.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is guaranteeing Capped Notes Linked to the Class A Common Stock of Strategy Inc, issued by JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC. These unsecured, unsubordinated obligations offer exposure to the appreciation of Strategy Inc's stock, with a maximum return of at least 300.00% at maturity, while protecting investors from losing more than 20% of their principal. The notes are scheduled to price around February 25, 2026, and mature on February 28, 2031.

feed.title: Form 424B2 JPMORGAN CHASE & CO
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has filed a Form 424B2 for Callable Contingent Interest Notes due February 23, 2029, linked to the performance of the State Street® SPDR® S&P® Regional Banking ETF, iShares® Russell 2000 ETF, and EURO STOXX 50® Index. These notes offer contingent interest payments if each underlying's value is at or above 65.00% of its Initial Value, with an early redemption option for JPMorgan Financial. Investing in these notes carries risks, including potential loss of principal, as payments are contingent on the least performing underlying.

feed.title: Smart Money Is Betting Big In LRCX Options
feed.summary: Whale investors have shown a predominantly bearish sentiment towards Lam Research (NASDAQ: LRCX) based on recent options trading. Out of 34 detected trades, 52% were bearish, with significant put and call volumes suggesting a target price range between $120.0 and $270.0 for the next three months. Despite a recent stock price decline, analysts maintain an average price target of $276.2, predominantly holding Buy or Overweight ratings.

feed.title: New digital tower system aims to cut delays, boost safety at Reagan National
feed.summary: Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) has deployed a new Terminal Flight Data Manager (TFDM) system at Washington Reagan National Airport, which replaces traditional paper flight strips with real-time digital tools to enhance ground efficiency and safety. The implementation was completed 45% faster than the standard 18-month cycle, with the system aiming to reduce delays, improve coordination, and strengthen safety. This brings the number of airports using TFDM to ten, with more rollouts planned.

feed.title: October 16th Options Now Available For American Tower (AMT)
feed.summary: New options for American Tower Corp (AMT) with an October 16th expiration date are now available, offering opportunities for option sellers to achieve higher premiums due to the extended time value. Stock Options Channel has identified a put contract at a $180.00 strike price and a call contract at a $190.00 strike price, detailing potential returns and risks for investors. The article highlights these contracts as attractive alternatives for investors interested in AMT shares, providing analysis on their implied volatility and potential YieldBoost returns.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges Oracle Corporation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC has filed a class action lawsuit against Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL) and some of its officers, alleging violations of federal securities laws. The lawsuit claims Oracle misrepresented its AI infrastructure strategy, leading to massive capital expenditure increases without corresponding revenue growth and creating serious risks for the company's debt, credit rating, and free cash flow. Investors who purchased Oracle securities between June 12, 2025, and December 16, 2025, are encouraged to join the case before the April 6, 2026 lead plaintiff deadline.

feed.title: Target vs. Costco: Which Discount Retail Stock Has Better Upside Now?
feed.summary: This article compares Target (TGT) and Costco (COST) as investment opportunities in the discount retail sector. It highlights Target's strategic transformation, digital capabilities, and attractive valuation, positioning it as a strong buy. Costco, despite its resilient membership model and loyal customer base, is deemed less attractive due to its high valuation.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: CVR Partners LP Q4 2025 reveals revenue miss
feed.summary: CVR Partners LP reported a net loss of $10 million and net sales of $131 million for Q4 2025, missing analyst expectations with an EPS of -$0.80. The company's stock dropped 0.92% premarket due to lower ammonia plant utilization from facility maintenance and startup issues. Despite the setback, CVR Partners remains optimistic about strong fertilizer demand for the upcoming planting season and plans operational improvements for Q1 2026.

feed.title: News | Boeing returns defense HQ to greater St. Louis
feed.summary: Boeing is moving its defense, space and security division headquarters back to the St. Louis area after an eight-year absence, signaling a major commitment to the region's commercial real estate and workforce. This move aims to improve efficiency by reuniting company leadership with manufacturing, engineering, and production teams. The decision follows a recent resolution of a major labor dispute and substantial investment in advanced combat aircraft production facilities in the St. Louis region.

feed.title: Jefferies Raises Price Target on Welltower to $242 From $231, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for Welltower (WELL) to $242 from $231, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects continued analyst confidence in the specialized REIT which focuses on health care infrastructure. Other firms like Citigroup and Morgan Stanley have also recently updated their price targets for Welltower, generally maintaining positive outlooks.

feed.title: US civil rights agency sues Coca-Cola distributor for excluding men from casino work trip
feed.summary: The U.S. Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC) has sued Coca-Cola Beverages Northeast for alleged sex discrimination, claiming the company excluded male employees from a women-only networking event held at a casino resort in Connecticut. This lawsuit challenges diversity programming, an area the EEOC has specifically targeted since President Donald Trump's administration. Coca-Cola Northeast expressed disappointment in the EEOC's action, stating they look forward to presenting their case in court.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Kimco Realty Price Target to $24 From $21, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has increased its price target for Kimco Realty (KIM) to $24 from $21, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for Kimco Realty, with several firms adjusting price targets and ratings in mid-February 2026. The company recently reported its Q4 2025 earnings and provided a positive outlook for 2026, driven by strong leasing demand.

feed.title: Mizuho Adjusts Price Target on Edison International to $79 From $66, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Mizuho has increased its price target for Edison International (EIX) to $79 from the previous $66, while reaffirming an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook from the analyst firm for the utility company. The news comes alongside other analyst updates for Edison International, including Barclays also raising its price target.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Boston Scientific Price Target to $98 From $99, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has adjusted its price target for Boston Scientific (BSX) to $98, down from $99, while reaffirming a Buy rating on the stock. This update reflects a minor revision in the analyst's valuation, despite ongoing positive sentiment for the medical equipment company.

feed.title: Former Royal Caribbean CEO Joins Investor Calling for Major Changes at Norwegian
feed.summary: Adam Goldstein, former Royal Caribbean executive, has announced his collaboration with Elliott Investment Management to advocate for significant operational and strategic changes at Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH). Elliott, a major investor in NCLH, has issued a critical assessment of the cruise giant's financial performance and leadership. Goldstein, who is being put forward as a potential board member, believes he can help restore Norwegian to a leading position in the industry.

feed.title: This Marketing Stock Is the S&P 500’s Top Performer Today. A Big Merger Helped.
feed.summary: Omnicom Group (OMC) was the top performer in the S&P 500 today, seeing a jump in revenue following its merger with Interpublic Group. The marketing conglomerate also authorized a significant stock buyback, contributing to its strong performance.

feed.title: US civil rights agency sues Coca-Cola distributor for excluding men from casino work trip
feed.summary: The U.S. Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC) is suing Coca-Cola Beverages Northeast for alleged sex discrimination, claiming the company excluded male employees from a women's networking event at a casino resort. The lawsuit challenges diversity programming, an area the EEOC has recently targeted, and seeks monetary compensation for men who were excluded. Coca-Cola Northeast expressed disappointment in the EEOC's investigation process and stated they look forward to being vindicated in court.

feed.title: Humana Invests $1.7 Million To Improve Health Outcomes Across Illinois
feed.summary: Humana is investing over $1.7 million in Illinois to enhance healthcare outcomes, focusing on housing stability, workforce development, maternal and behavioral healthcare, and reducing health disparities. This new funding brings Humana's total investment in Illinois to over $3 million, supporting various organizations aligned with the Illinois Department of Healthcare and Family Services' priorities. The initiatives include expanding behavioral health services, building community health worker infrastructure, addressing rural dentist shortages, and improving chronic disease management.

feed.title: October 16th Options Now Available For Xylem (XYL)
feed.summary: New options contracts for Xylem Inc (XYL) with an October 16th expiration date are now available, offering opportunities for option sellers to gain higher premiums due to the longer time until expiration. BNK Invest's YieldBoost formula highlights specific put and call contracts, demonstrating potential returns and strategies such as selling a cash-secured put or a covered call. These strategies could offer annualized returns of 8.07% for the put and 8.94% for the covered call, based on current market conditions and implied volatility data.

feed.title: Submarine communications systems to be supplied for U.S. Navy submarines by L3Harris
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies has secured a full-rate production contract from General Dynamics Electric Boat to provide 26 shipsets of submarine communications systems for the U.S. Navy's Virginia- and Columbia-class submarines. This follow-on award covers production through 2033 and includes potential support for future Columbia-class platforms and allied navies. The systems aim to enhance crew communication and situational awareness while maintaining low observability for submarine operations.

feed.title: Insulet Posts Strong Q4 Results, Expands Share Repurchase Program
feed.summary: Insulet (PODD) reported robust fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results, demonstrating 31% revenue growth and marking a decade of consistent expansion in constant currency. The company's Omnipod franchise, particularly internationally, fueled customer growth and financial improvements. In a show of financial strength and confidence, Insulet's board approved a $350 million increase to its share repurchase program, bringing the total to $475 million.

feed.title: Utility Heavyweight Southern Stock Climbs On Strong Q4 Demand
feed.summary: Southern Company (NYSE: SO) saw its stock climb after reporting strong Q4 2025 results, with operating revenue up 10.1% year-over-year to $6.98 billion, surpassing consensus estimates. Despite missing adjusted EPS expectations slightly, the company experienced robust kilowatt-hour sales growth and an increase in regulated utility customers. CEO Chris Womack highlighted 2025 as a transformative year, with the company meeting growing demand responsibly, and the company provided an optimistic outlook for fiscal 2026 adjusted EPS.

feed.title: GE United Engine Deal Deepens Growth Story For Aerospace Revenues
authors: Simply Wall St Reviewed by Bailey Pemberton
feed.summary: GE Aerospace has secured a significant deal with United Airlines to supply 300 GEnx engines for its Boeing 787 Dreamliner fleet, making United the largest global GEnx operator. This agreement not only strengthens the existing relationship between the companies but also underscores GE's strong performance, with its stock up 57.5% over the past year. The deal is expected to contribute to GE Aerospace's long-term revenue, particularly through recurring maintenance and services, reinforcing the company's focus on cash flow and expanding its installed engine base.

feed.title: UBS lowers Moody’s stock price target to $490 on valuation concerns By Investing.com
feed.summary: UBS has lowered its price target for Moody's Corp (NYSE:MCO) shares to $490 from $515, while maintaining a Neutral rating, citing valuation concerns despite a solid performance and positive outlook. The firm acknowledges Moody's as a high-quality franchise with a good growth trajectory, particularly in its core ratings business, and notes its resilience against AI disruption. However, UBS believes the stock trades at a significant premium, suggesting better risk/reward opportunities exist elsewhere in the sector.

feed.title: JPMorgan’s in-house insurer keeps its A grade from AM Best
feed.summary: AM Best has reaffirmed its Financial Strength Rating of A (Excellent) and Long-Term Issuer Credit Rating of "a" (Excellent) for Park Assurance Company, JPMorgan Chase's captive insurer. The ratings reflect Park's very strong balance sheet, strong operating performance, and integral role within JPMorgan Chase, despite a limited business profile due to product concentration and reliance on reinsurance and the Terrorism Risk Insurance Program Reauthorization Act. Park provides critical global property coverages to JPMorgan Chase, benefiting from the parent company’s significant financial and professional resources.

feed.title: Edison International Q4 Earnings Top Estimates, Sales Increase Y/Y
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX) reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2025, with adjusted earnings topping Zacks Consensus Estimates by 27.4% and total revenues increasing 30.9% year-over-year. The company's Southern California Edison segment saw a significant rise in adjusted earnings, attributed to cost recoveries and revenue recognition. Despite the positive performance, Edison International's 2026 earnings guidance of $5.90-$6.20 per share is below the Zacks Consensus Estimate.

feed.title: Barclays Raises Price Target for Edison Intl (EIX) to $78 | EIX Stock News
feed.summary: Barclays has raised its price target for Edison International (EIX) to $78 from $67, maintaining an "Overweight" rating. This 16.42% increase reflects continued confidence in the utility company's market performance. The updated target comes amidst varying analyst ratings, with other firms like UBS and Jefferies also adjusting their outlooks for EIX.

feed.title: Barclays Raises Price Target for ADM to $68.00 | ADM Stock News
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) to $68.00 from $61.00, while maintaining an "Equal-Weight" rating. This decision follows previous adjustments from other analysts, including JP Morgan and Morgan Stanley, with the average target price from 10 analysts now standing at $60.87, implying a potential downside. Archer-Daniels-Midland is a major processor of agricultural commodities and also has a significant nutrition business.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on National Energy Services Reunited to $31 From $25, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for National Energy Services Reunited Corp. (NESR) to $31 from $25, while reiterating its "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes after the company reported its Q4 2025 earnings, which showed an increase in adjusted earnings and revenue. NESR is an oilfield service provider operating primarily in the Middle East, North Africa, and Asia Pacific regions.
